items.name: linux-security-monitor
items.description: Read-only Linux security monitor that teaches while it watches. Flutter desktop app showing your ports, firewall, SSH, services & users — every metric explained, every command traceable. Init-agnostic (systemd/OpenRC/runit), capability-based provider resolution, zero root, zero telemetry.
